title: On a Whim Is Now In Stores!
excerpt: I'm so excited to announce that my latest line, On A Whim, is now available in stores! Please ask your local scrapbook stores if they have received it yet - we love supporting our brick and mortars as well as…
body: I'm so excited to announce that my latest line, On A Whim, is now available in stores! Please ask your local scrapbook stores if they have received it yet - we love supporting our brick and mortars as well as our online shops. You can purchase the entire collection at Simon Says Stamp and Scrapbook.com!
